boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: AUTH-ZEN-080 exactly matches site, protocol, consent, date, and enrollment authority
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: FEAS-ZEN-080 is planning only and does not represent execution authority.

final_answer: The action may proceed. AUTH-ZEN-080 precisely matches the required activation authority for site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, and the activation date of 2026-06-28, including enrollment authority. FEAS-ZEN-080 is confirmed as a planning artifact, not execution authority. The source boundary is closed per STD-ZEN-080-P.
open_blockers: planning artifact vs execution authority boundary intact
